title: Self-Awareness
objective: Students will explore self-awareness concepts including Questioning First Impressions.

steps.content: Let's discover the amazing world of Questioning First Impressions!
Notice when your first reading of a social situation might be wrong — your assumptions about why someone acted a certain way are not always facts
Time to try this out: Pause before reacting to a classmate's behaviour and consider an alternative explanation — e.g. 'Maybe they bumped me by accident, not on purpose'
If you felt sure someone was being unfair or unkind, could they pause and consider whether there might be another explanation for what happened?

Amazing work! Let's review what we discovered about Questioning First Impressions. Pause before reacting to a classmate's behaviour and consider an alternative explanation — e.g. 'Maybe they bumped me by accident, not on purpose' Describe a time they assumed the worst about someone's intention and later found out they were wrong
